description_long: This object consists of two groups of muffins, each arranged on a separate plate. The muffins have a rough, textured surface, suggesting a hearty, oat-filled or nutty composition, and are golden-brown in color. One group is stacked in a small pile on a round white ceramic plate, while the other group is spread out on a square white ceramic plate. The muffins appear dense and rustic, with no visible frosting or decorative elements. There are no visible wrappers, and the muffins' surfaces are uneven and craggy, indicating a homemade or artisanal style. The plates are simple and unadorned, emphasizing the muffins as the focal point.
description: A set of rustic, golden-brown muffins with a rough, textured surface, arranged on plain white ceramic plates. The muffins are dense and appear homemade, with no visible frosting or wrappers.
description_view_0: Front view showing both plates: a stack of muffins on a round plate in the back and a spread of muffins on a square plate in the front.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the two plates side by side, highlighting the difference in arrangement between the stacked and spread muffins.
description_view_2: Rear view with the stacked muffins on the round plate in the foreground and the spread muffins on the square plate behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing both plates side by side, with the stacked muffins on the left and the spread muffins on the right.
attribute_placement_location: on a white ceramic plate and a white ceramic square dish
